title: Can I have the same pulse appear in multiple boards?
excerpt: I have my clients set quarterly goals that usually consists of a list of 3-4 items per department. Think ‘big rocks’. We then have a 2nd combined board that captures all of the actionable items across the business. Think…

posts.author: Natasha (Natasha)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have my clients set quarterly goals that usually consists of a list of 3-4 items per department. Think ‘big rocks’. We then have a 2nd combined board that captures all of the actionable items across the business. Think ‘little rocks’.

The ‘little rocks’ inevitably link back to the ‘big rocks’, for example:

  • BIG ROCK: hire a new manager
  • LITTLE ROCKS: place an advertisement on seek, interview candidates etc.

At the moment we keep having to switch between the big rock boards and little rock board to copy the data across. Is there a way we can have one pulse that appears in both boards?

Edit: This function would be the same as mirroring, but for a pulse rather than a collum.

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Natasha , what if you have those items live on multiple boards? will that achieve your desired results? We’ve developed an app to help users who are looking for this feature. Link to our App in the Marketplace

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Natasha

We actually built an app specifically for this use case. Mirror Item Multiple Boards lets you:

  • Keep one item synced across unlimited boards
  • Update anywhere, changes reflect everywhere instantly
  • Add subitems, comments, and files in the sync
  • Exclude certain columns
  • See live sync status in using the sync table feature

How it works: You just select an item, choose which boards to mirror it to, and that’s it. Any updates sync automatically in real-time.

Since we just launched, we’re offering 50% off yearly plans for early adopters (around $18/month).

Happy to answer any questions or show a quick demo if helpful! Schedule a call here
